name: Seitan Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------BATTER--------------------------
1 cup Whole wheat flour
1/4 cup Corn meal
1 1.5 cups Water
1/4 tsp Salt
--------------------------TOPPING--------------------------
10 1.5 oz Soft silken tofu
1 tsp Maple syrup
2 tsp Italian herbs
- (marjoram, sage, oregano, basil, thyme, rosemary)
1/4 cup Tahini
1 tsp Miso
1 pinch Nutmeg (optional)
1. For the batter: Mix together flour, corn meal, water and salt to make a thin batter. Let sit for at least 10 minutes.
2. Dip pieces of seitan into batter. Pan fry in oil on both sides until brown.
3. Combine topping ingredients together in a blender and blend until smooth.
4. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
5. Pour 1 cup sauce into a 9" x 13" baking dish, distributing evenly.
6. Place fried seitan on top of the sauce.
7. Spread onions on top of seitan.
8. Pour remaining sauce over onions and top with tofu topping.
9. Bake for 30 minutes.
This is a fairly close approximation to what a parmigiana dish should be like. It is based on the mushroom stroganoff from the American Vegetarian Cookbook, and comes from Renee Wheeler.
